channel.title: Murmur
channel.description: Updates for Murmur, private on-device speech-to-text for macOS.

item.title: Version 0.7.3
item.description:
• New: optional speaker labels for your own side of a meeting. When two people share this Mac's microphone, turn on “Also label others sharing my microphone” (under speaker labels in Settings) and the most talkative becomes “You” while the others are labelled “Local”. Off by default; you can re-transcribe an existing meeting to apply it.
  • Faster: switching your speech model in Settings now downloads it right away instead of stalling your first transcription later.
  • Shortcuts now display command-first (⌘⌥E).
